{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Raion’s Divine Titan
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Raion’s Divine Titan]] is a fifty-yard-tall mech.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15">''The Pilot'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
